field.label: Address
field.help: Hostname or IP address of the OpenWrt router.

field.label: Hostname
field.help: Display name for this router. Used as a label throughout the UI.

field.label: Description
field.help: Optional notes about this router (location, role, etc.).

field.label: SSH username
field.help: Username for SSH connections to this router. Leave as 'root' unless you have configured a dedicated SSH user on the router.

field.label: SSH public key
field.help: Select the firewall SSH public key that should be authorized on this router. Use 'Copy Public Key' to copy it to the clipboard, then add it to /root/.ssh/authorized_keys on the router.

field.label: Sync Wi-Fi config from
field.help: Select another router of the same hardware model to use as the Wi-Fi config source. When synced, this router's /etc/config/wireless will be overwritten with the source's content.

field.label: Sync system config from
field.help: Select another router of the same hardware model to use as the system config source. When synced, /etc/config/system will be overwritten from the source — except the hostname, which is always preserved from this router.

field.label: Sync firewall config from
field.help: Select another router of the same hardware model to use as the firewall config source. When synced, /etc/config/firewall will be overwritten with the source's content.

field.label: Sync DHCP config from
field.help: Select another router of the same hardware model to use as the DHCP config source. When synced, /etc/config/dhcp (dnsmasq settings) will be overwritten with the source's content.

field.label: Sync authentication config from (rpcd)
field.help: Select another router of the same hardware model to use as the rpcd config source. rpcd controls LuCI and ubus access control (users, roles, permissions). When synced, /etc/config/rpcd will be overwritten with the source's content.

field.label: Config Source
field.help: The configured config sync source(s) and whether this router's configs currently match the source.

field.label: Status
field.help: Live health status from the last broker poll: Healthy, Warning, or Critical based on CPU load, memory, and disk usage.

field.label: Version
field.help: OpenWrt firmware version detected from the last broker poll.

field.label: Hardware
field.help: Hardware model detected from the last broker poll.
